title: inula koelzii
intro: Inula koelzii, also known as the Chinese elecampane, is a plant species native to the high-altitude plateaus of the Qinghai-Tibetan Plateau. The plant has been traditionally used in Tibetan medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Inula koelzii is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and alleviating digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
